Package org.eventb.internal.core.preferences

Class TacticPrefElement

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.preferences.TacticPrefElement
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPrefElementTranslator<ITacticDescriptor>
public class TacticPrefElement extends Object implements IPrefElementTranslator<ITacticDescriptor>
The preference element translator for tactic descriptors.
Since:
2.1

    Method

    String
    extract(ITacticDescriptor desc)
    Returns the string value of the given element which is significant for its storage in a preference.
    ITacticDescriptor

    Returns the value created from the given string parameter.

  • Method Details

    • extract

      public String extract(ITacticDescriptor desc)
      Description copied from interface: IPrefElementTranslator
      Returns the string value of the given element which is significant for its storage in a preference.
      Specified by:
      extract in interface IPrefElementTranslator<ITacticDescriptor>
      Parameters:
      desc - the element to be stored in a preference
      Returns:
      a string corresponding to the element given as parameter

    • inject

      public ITacticDescriptor inject(String str, IInjectLog log)
      Description copied from interface: IPrefElementTranslator
      Returns the value created from the given string parameter.
      Specified by:
      inject in interface IPrefElementTranslator<ITacticDescriptor>
      Parameters:
      str - the information to create the element
      log - a log of injection problems
      Returns:
      the element created from the given information
